prompt: Create a wide, minimalist anime illustration in a soft Niji-style watercolor look: a quiet teenage girl crouches low on the left side of the canvas, facing right, gently extending one hand toward a sitting black cat on the right. The girl has short dark bobbed hair with straight bangs, pale skin, a calm slightly shy expression, and small hoop earrings. She wears an oversized dark olive hoodie, a dark plaid pleated skirt, white fishnet tights, chunky black platform shoes with laces, and a large soft guitar case strapped diagonally across her back, rising behind her head. Her pose is compact and balanced on the balls of her feet, knees bent, one arm resting forward and the other reaching delicately toward the cat. The cat sits upright, tail stretched along the ground, looking at her hand with a quiet curious expression; its inner ears have a subtle pink accent. Use a pale cream background with faint blue-gray watercolor clouds, lots of negative space, delicate thin linework, muted navy and olive shadows, gentle pastel lighting, and a dreamy hand-painted texture. Keep the composition horizontal and cinematic, with the girl occupying the left third and the cat in the right third, separated by open air and a tender moment of almost-touching. No text, no borders, no photorealism.
